text: JWT authentication bypass vulnerability discovered. The alg:none header is accepted by the token validation endpoint, allowing unauthenticated access to any user account.

Export to CSV fails on rows with commas in the Notes field. Steps to reproduce: add a record with a comma in Notes, then click Export. Expected: the row is quoted correctly. Actual: export crashes. Environment: Web app v4.12.1, Windows 11.
